UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DAN DELANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHOW THAT ALL 22 LINES OF PARAGRAPHS 16 AND 17 ARE IMPROPER OR IRRELEVANT AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND VIOLATION OF B&P CODE 17200 AND/OR 17500. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO FILE HIS ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Jaymee Faith Sagisi of Greenstein & McDonald Attorneys at Law (415-773-1240) appearing for plaintiff David Canon opposing party.
Atty. Fritz Clapp of Fritz Clapp Attorney at Law (888-292-5784) appear for defendant Norris Dan Walter Delany moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted as follow: DEFENDANT DAN DELANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. To the extent causes of action are alleged as personal injury, allegations are sufficient; to the extent causes of action are subject to CCP 425.10(a), damages are limited to $150,000 as explained in Plaintiff's opposition. Defendant has 30 days to file his answer. Order signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/AJR)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Jaymee Faith Sagisi of Greenstein & McDonald Attorneys at Law (415-773-1240) appearing for plaintiff David Canon opposing party.
Atty. Fritz Clapp of Fritz Clapp Attorney at Law (888-292-5784) appear for defendant Norris Dan Walter Delany moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DAN DELANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Defendant failed to show that all 22 lines of paragraphs 16 and 17 are improper or irrelevant as to the causes of action for negligence and violation of B&P Code 17200 and/or 17500. Defendant has 30 days to file his answer. Order signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/AJR)
